name: education_heat_dome_stresses_kestrel_car_fair
premise: A cheating investigation used keystroke logs; honor council wants expulsion while disability services says the pattern could be assistive tech. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education heat dome stresses kestrel car fair has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. Framing has already hardened externally as care against fairness; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Darius Silva
agents.identity: I am Darius Silva, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Zara Park
agents.identity: I am Zara Park, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with fairness.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to fairness to preserve operational care.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Darius Silva must choose under care versus fairness. What does Darius Silva do?
